message.roll_mod.nether_storm.warning: First and last warning! The storm is approaching — leave the Nether NOW!
message.roll_mod.nether_storm.start: A Nether storm is coming! Hold your breath, or perish!
message.roll_mod.nether_storm.end: The storm has stopped... but for how long?
message.roll_mod.end_locked: You must find and enter a stronghold before you can travel to The End!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.drink_stretch: §5Wixie: §3Take a sip of water and straighten your back!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.stand_breathe: §5Wixie: §fStand up, stretch your legs, and take a deep breath.
message.roll_mod.broadcast.tea_break: §5Wixie: §eTake a tea break. The best automation ideas come to mind during rest!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.open_questboo: §5Wixie: §6Don't know your next step? Open the quest book!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.stuck_questbo: §5Wixie: §6Stuck in one place and don't know what to build next? Check the quest book — it will guide you!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.overwhelmed_q: §5Wixie: §fFeeling overwhelmed and don't know where to start? Open the quests — your step-by-step plan is there!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.multiblock_ch: §5Wixie: §6Multiblock not working? Before panicking, check it with a wrench.
message.roll_mod.broadcast.first_join: §5Wixie: §eWelcome to ModernTech! §bYour journey begins with the quest book — open it and choose your first step!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.plutonium_can: §5Wixie: §2Plutonium Candy §f— the best energy boost for a true engineer!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.golden_baton: §5Wixie: §fHow many §eGolden Batons §fdoes it take to support ostriches?
message.roll_mod.broadcast.sulfur_jam: §5Wixie: §6Sulfur Jam §f— when you want something sour... and explosive!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.sulfur_pie: §5Wixie: §6Sulfur Pie §fmade from sulfur berries — a dessert that makes the world brighter. Literally.
message.roll_mod.broadcast.golden_potato: §5Wixie: §eGolden Potato Porridge §f— a warm breakfast that warms the soul and fills you with energy!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.creosote_plat: §5Wixie: §8Creosote Plate §f— looks like chocolate, but better not try it!
message.roll_mod.broadcast.shop_dimensio: §5Wixie: there is shop dimension with shops of players!
